name: Console (Python on Pixi)
updateContentCommand: if [ ! -f /home/vscode/.pixi/bin/pixi ]; then curl -fsSL https://pixi.sh/install.sh | bash; fi && for rc in .bashrc .zshrc; do grep -q 'pixi shell-hook' /home/vscode/$rc || echo 'eval "$(pixi shell-hook)"' >> /home/vscode/$rc; grep -q '.pixi/bin' /home/vscode/$rc || echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.pixi/bin:$PATH"' >> /home/vscode/$rc; done
